title: Nature X
description: Make your worlds feel much lively and much fuller!
body:
![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad95c7994832f0963d663e6feb08a4d0ecad1dbe.png)
![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62ff067cf8799fc85378023ec6d63da978172b68.png)
[![Image](https://i.postimg.cc/SRQkL6sP/get.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/nature-x-plus)
*********************************************************************************************
**Nature X Requirements:** [Click on the image below to go to the mod's OFFICIAL download page]

- Nature X requires **Sodium**:

[![Image](https://i.postimg.cc/m2B9NJvs/sodium-icon.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/versions)

- You also need to have **Continuity** and **Polytone**, which require the **Fabric API**

[![Image](https://i.postimg.cc/cLYNxkJs/continuity-icon.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity/versions)
[![Image](https://i.postimg.cc/5NDVMWbZ/fabric-api-icon.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions)
[![Image](https://i.postimg.cc/cJSGr7Kr/Polytone-icon.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone/versions)

********************************************************************************

**Notes:**
Make sure to set theses settings [in Sodium] to the following:
- **Quality > Leaves > Fancy**
- **Quality > Particles > All**
- **Quality > Smooth Lighting > ON**
- **If there are any options related to enabling/ disabling fog, please make sure it's enabled.**

********************************************************************************
